name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i picks up left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down left fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down right fork *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
          /\ states[i] = "eating"

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = -> 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = -> 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

    \/ /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, lastRetransmitCount + 1)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>
    /\ lastChunk \in chunks
    /\ lastRetransmitCount \in retransmitCount
    /\ lastRetransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i])
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset)

RandomOffset == [i \in 1..N |-> Random(-Delta, Delta)]

Avg(v) == Sum(1..N, v) \div N

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in Int
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in Int

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>> ==

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known[Len(infected) + 1])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ p \in free
        /\ c \in Client
        /\ p \in Pages
        /\ c \in Client

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
